questionHtml: With reference to Figure 1, explain why the price elasticity of demand for capsicums would change if the price continued to increase beyond NZ$24 per kg.
markschemeHtml: A response that does not make some reference to the diagram (eg linear demand curve; capsicums; a calculation) may be awarded a maximum of [3].

meta.title: With reference to Figure 1, explain why the price elasticity of demand for capsicums would change if the price continued to increase beyond NZ$24 per kg.
